title: Simply Trims
description: Tired of the same old diamond pattern on each trim item? Well this pack changes that!
body:
Have you ever thought, why do the smithing template textures always use the diamond trim as their color? \
Me too, so I decided to fix that.


### Images
![Simply Trims item frame showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Oz1jbvVx/images/c2c9e76ef73dc18e5c852f27178ffbe793b8f718_350.webp)
![Simply Trims showcase chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XGxg0qHy/images/483553fbf8528dc6403366b5d6413cd1b51cda93_350.webp) 


### Animated version
Still feeling stale and boring? \
Check out [Everything Animated!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/everything-animated!) where an animated version of the trims are present and more!
